examples: the substance scintillated sparks and flashes
Unquarried marble sparkled on the hillside

meanings.definition: emit or reflect light in a flickering manner
examples: Does a constellation twinkle more brightly than a single star?

meanings.definition: physics: fluoresce momentarily when struck by a charged particle or high-energy photon
be lively or brilliant or exhibit virtuosity
examples: his playing coruscated throughout the concert hall
